headline: Podcast: The Wolf-Krugman Exchange returns
summary: How one year of President Donald Trump has reshaped the world economy, democracy and capitalism
body_text:
Martin Wolf, the FT’s chief economics commentator, and Nobel Prize-winning economist Paul Krugman return with a second season of their podcast series “The Wolf-Krugman Exchange”.

In this four-part season they assess the first year of President Donald Trump’s second term, discussing the state of the US economy, how white, rural voters are faring, given they powered Trump’s re-election, and the deepening power struggle between the US and China.

In the first season of “The Wolf-Krugman Exchange”, Wolf and Krugman examined the economic and political shifts reshaping the world in the wake of Trump’s re-election. Watch the full first season here. Listen to “The Wolf-Krugman Exchange” within The Economics Show podcast feed on Apple Podcasts, Spotify, Pocket Casts or wherever you listen to podcasts.

Episodes will also appear here and be available on the FT’s YouTube channel.

Send your questions for Martin and Paul to economics.show@ft.com.
